recommendations.title: A Haunted House 2
recommendations.overview: After exorcising the demons of his ex, Malcolm starts afresh with his new girlfriend and her two children. After moving into their dream home, Malcolm is once again plagued by bizarre paranormal events.

recommendations.title: Sextuplets
recommendations.overview: Father-to-be Alan is shocked to learn that he was born a sextuplet. With his newfound brother Russell riding shotgun, the duo sets out on a hilarious journey to reunite with their remaining long-lost siblings.

recommendations.title: Fifty Shades of Black
recommendations.overview: An inexperienced college student meets a wealthy businessman whose sexual practices put a strain on their relationship.

recommendations.title: Naked
recommendations.overview: Following a wild night out with his best man, Rob Anderson wakes up to find himself naked in an elevator on the morning of his wedding day and is forced to relive the morning over and over again.

recommendations.title: The Sixth Sense
recommendations.overview: Following an unexpected tragedy, child psychologist Malcolm Crowe meets a nine year old boy named Cole Sear, who is hiding a dark secret.

recommendations.title: Abracadabra
recommendations.overview: A housewife struggles with her husband after he is possessed by a ghost.

recommendations.title: The Devil's Mark
recommendations.overview: An exorcist priest meets a family that has a daughter who is pursued by a demon.

recommendations.title: Mr Malcolm's List

recommendations.title: The Cleansing Hour
recommendations.overview: Two millennial entrepreneurs stage elaborate fake exorcisms on social media until one of their girlfriends becomes possessed by a demon.

recommendations.title: The Blackwell Ghost
